title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 21 2023
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 21 2023
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report August 21 2023
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 21/08/2023
DCE iron ore futures continued to ﬂuctuate in a day, the main contract I2401 closed 777, an increase only 0.91% through- out the day;some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills tended to be wait-and-see, but purchasing enthusiasm has improved, purchased on demand. Today the overall market transaction atmosphere is acceptable. PBF at Shandong port dealt 865-870 yuan/mt; increased 5-12 yuan/mt from last Friday.
